INSERT SOFT INTO user (u_id, u_name) SELECT user_id, user_name FROM (SELECT 1 AS user_id, 'alice' AS user_name UNION SELECT 1, 'bob' UNION SELECT 3, 'charlie') AS temp;
INSERT SOFT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, product_name) SELECT 1, u.u_id, 'new_gadget' FROM user u WHERE u.u_name = 'alice' AND u.u_id < 3;
